description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build source tarball that triggers on published releases and workflow dispatches. The workflow should run two jobs, make_src_dist and make_src_dist_fully_vendored, on an ubuntu-latest environment with concurrency control. Each job checks out the repository, installs build dependencies, builds a source tarball using tools/make_src_dist.py, and uploads the tarball as an artifact or to a release.
